name: Axiom Intelligence Acquisition Corp 1
summary: Axiom Intelligence Acquisition Corp 1 (AXIN) is a blank check special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed to identify and complete an initial Business Combination with one or more target businesses. The company holds proceeds in a Trust Account and has a Management Team focused on generating and executing acquisition opportunities to create value for shareholders.
